summary: Frontend UI color and visibility testing completed successfully. All requested features verified: Back/Lay colors updated to blue (#1a56db) and dark red (#991b1b), all 8 market sections visible for scheduled matches, betting flow works for pre-match betting.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI color changes verified. Back buttons use blue (#1a56db), Lay buttons use dark red (#991b1b). All market sections (Match Odds, Session Markets, Over Runs, Fall of Wickets, Team Total Runs, Partnership Markets, Special Markets, TIED_MATCH) are visible for scheduled matches. Betting flow works - clicking odds adds to bet slip, login required to place bets.

homepage_back_lay_colors.details: Homepage shows 'Back' and 'Lay' column headers with correct colors - Back is blue (#1a56db), Lay is dark red (#991b1b)

match_page_back_lay_colors.details: Match Odds section shows Back (blue #1a56db) and Lay (dark red #991b1b) buttons with correct colors

session_markets_colors.details: Session Markets show No (pink #FAA9BA) and Yes (blue #72BBEF) columns with correct values

all_market_sections_visible_scheduled.details: All 8 market sections visible for scheduled match: Match Odds, Session Markets, Over Runs Markets, Fall of Wickets, Team Total Runs, Partnership Markets, Special Markets, TIED_MATCH

market_sections_collapsible.details: All market sections are collapsible - clicking header expands/collapses the section

bet_slip_functionality.details: Clicking on odds adds selection to Bet Slip. Shows selection name, odds, stake input, total stake, potential profit, and balance

pre_match_betting_message.details: Scheduled matches show 'Match has not started yet' with 'All markets are available for pre-match betting' message

login_required_for_betting.details: Non-logged in users see 'Please login to place bets' toast and login modal when clicking odds

tied_match_section.details: TIED_MATCH section visible with Yes/No rows, Back (blue gradient) and Lay (dark red gradient) columns, Cashout button
